basic_details.job_title: IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode) Admin. Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 15 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-Graduation with minimum two years experience in Clerical duties/office administration, Graduation with minimum three years experience in Clerical duties/office administration
qualification.details: Post-Graduation with minimum two years' of experience in Clerical duties/ office administration in a reputed Educational Institute or any Govt. / Private Organization OR Graduation with minimum three years' of experience in Clerical duties/ office administration in a reputed Educational Institute or any Govt. / Private Organization. Proficiency in MS Office Suite, Internet applications, virtual meeting platforms, database management systems, CRM/Alumni management platforms, Data management tools. Good Communication proficiency in English and Hindi, Drafting skills.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIM Kozhikode Admin. content_sections.text: Post-Graduation with minimum two years' of experience in Clerical duties/ office administration in a reputed Educational Institute or any Govt. / Private Organization OR Graduation with minimum three years' of experience in Clerical duties/ office administration in a reputed Educational Institute or any Govt. / Private Organization. Proficiency in MS Office Suite, Internet applications, virtual meeting platforms, database management systems, CRM/Alumni management platforms, Data management tools. Good Communication proficiency in English and Hindi, Drafting skills.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Admin. Associate post at IIM Kozhikode is 05-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Admin. Associate position?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a Post-Graduation with at least two years of experience or Graduation with at least three years of experience in clerical or office administration roles.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Admin. Associate position is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Admin. Associate post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 24,300/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Admin. Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Admin. Associate position at IIM Kozhikode.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official website of IIM Kozhikode.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Admin. Associate role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of candidates followed by an interview conducted via video conference.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What are the key skills required for the Admin. Associate position?
faq.answer: Proficiency in MS Office, internet applications, virtual meeting platforms, database management, CRM/Alumni management, data management tools, and strong English and Hindi communication and drafting skills are required.
